title: Roblox Doors Music Discs
description: Adds music discs for all the tracks from Roblox Doors (Vol. I-V) into Minecraft with crafting recipes!
body:
# Roblox Doors Music Discs
## Credits
All music for Roblox Doors is not mine. They were created by LSPLASH, and they are non-copyright and free to use.

[Youtube - LSPLASH](https://www.youtube.com/@LSPLASH)

[Spotify - LSPLASH](https://open.spotify.com/artist/03R6r9e5DPFzPQ0UJojAIn?si=91Whm2v2QL273mNC5IjRlQ)

[DOORS 👁️](https://www.roblox.com/games/6516141723/DOORS)

![Copyright Free (Roblox Doors Description)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd1230d891e64e26a3d54a9bf5f025c2e7588e37.png)
## Mod Contents
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/R9LG2rObN80" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- This mod adds all the tracks from the Roblox Doors soundtracks (Vol. I-IV) as craftable music discs.

![All items in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36848fbccf96c85d4d26bec0b73737fe40d28cc6.png)
- Custom music discs are crafted using a new item called the Resonator, which is used at the core of the crafting recipe and allows the disc to produce sound. 

![Crafting Recipe for the Resonator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b72444adb76c8636d7fe1499744811dfab129a3c.png)
- For original music disc tracks, they are crafted using items which represent the entities and places present when the track plays in Doors.

![Example recipe for a music disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46eba5c7c8cbc0dbfce5e20e5631c06b2c817670.png)
- For remixes or adaptations of other tracks, a new item called the Instrument Shuffler can be used to create these. Most remixes or adaptations require new items.

![Crafting Recipe for Instrument Shuffler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2452494810133c8642b068aeb4dc42370d73a4be.png)
- Using [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) is recommended to see the music disc recipes.

## Requirements
- This mod is client and server-sided. If you want to use this mod in a world with others, all clients require this mod.
- This mod has no dependencies or known incompatibility.
